name: fact entity_ref naming an entity absent from mentions resolves-or-creates, never crashes
description: Adversarial hallucinated-referent probe. The model emits a fact whose entity_ref ('Cleo') and object_entity_ref ('Bjorn Industries') appear in NO mention. The pipeline must not crash and must not silently drop a load-bearing fact: pipeline._resolve_entities iterates fact.entity_ref/object_entity_ref into its name list even when no mention surface exists, so resolve_entity mints provisional entities for both and the relationship edge attaches cleanly. This pins the SAFE outcome (resolve-or-create) for a referent the model invented without a matching mention — proving the mentions array is not a required allowlist for fact refs. The entity citation falls back to chunk head text (anchor_for has no span for Cleo).

steps.body: Notes from the offsite about the new vendor partnership.
